text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed53 minutes agovia mobileReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Beige on53 minutes agoabout an hour agoLongstebesaid:2 hours agoClem77said:I've never been coached in football and don't have a clue how hard it is to implement a style of football that differs from what players have been used to. So for all those more tactically astute than myself, what are the expectations for those first 5 league games?Win them all or he gets fired 😂Nah, I was listening to someone on the telly the other day, can't exactly remember who said it but he mentioned the 9/10 games it took for Bournemouth to register their first win and it wouldn't take that long at Liverpool due to the calibre of players we have. Basically the footballing IQ is at a higher level compared to Bournemouth.Iraola also has many seasons experience of PL now and better infrastructure behind him.
